rulings.Case Title: CROWN TOWERS APARTMENTS A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. MICHAEL PAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And To Produce Documents; Deem Request For Admissions Admitted; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday July 11, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF CROWN TOWERS APARTMENTS A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And To Produce Documents; Deem Request For Admissions Admitted; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete responses without objections to Request for Production and Special Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $685. = (501/REQ)
